experiments.description: Original SKILL.md - all 5 scenarios pass all 5 evals
Added Quick Reference Card with 5 most common conversions at top
experiments.hypothesis: Quick Ref at top helps LLM find correct commands faster
improvements: Quick Reference enables faster E1/E2 derivation
CJK+xelatex and --extract-media consolidated in one place
regressions: Batch loop may omit --pdf-engine if agent copies blindly

experiments.description: Added inline error recovery callouts to Modes 1-4
experiments.hypothesis: Inline 'If X fails' callouts per mode strengthens E3 Verification by providing immediate recovery paths
improvements: PDF failure recovery inline in Mode 1
Batch PDF engine warning in Mode 2
Lua filter path check in Mode 4
regressions: Minor duplication with Error Handling table (~200 tokens)

experiments.description: Added --wrap=none to all Korean/reverse output examples and defaults file
experiments.hypothesis: Explicit --wrap=none in all CJK-relevant commands prevents mid-word line break issues and strengthens E2 Format-Specific Flags
improvements: Mode 6 prose updated to explain CJK rationale
regressions: Slightly longer command lines in Mode 6

experiments.description: Replaced generic verification bash with per-format validation table
experiments.hypothesis: Per-format validation table guides agent to choose format-appropriate verification commands, strengthening E3
improvements: MD reverse: head for binary artifact check
regressions: Table occupies more vertical space than inline bash (~50 tokens)

experiments.description: Project-specific filenames replace generic placeholders in Modes 3-4
experiments.hypothesis: Generic filenames (corporate.docx, a.lua) cause file-not-found errors when agent copies them directly
regressions: Slightly less generic -- new projects would need to adapt filenames
